title: TreeTimber v2
description: Tree faling plugin, new tree detection system
body:
# 🌲 TreeTimber v2 - This version of TreeTimber has the best tree detection system.

**Timber** is an essential plugin that allows players to fell entire trees with any axe, making resource collection more efficient in your Minecraft world.  

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/925403/description_d8b54d67-e16f-4662-9392-b1f56147c9e1.gif)
---

## 🔌 Supported Plugins  
- **WorldGuard** – Prevents tree felling in protected regions.  
---

## 🛠️ Installation  
1. Upload the plugin file to the `plugins` folder.  
2. Restart the server.  
3. **Note:** This is not a mod! If you need the **TreeTimber** mod, you can download it [here](url).  

---

## 🎮 Commands  

### 🔹 User Commands  
- `/timber` – Open the user menu.  

### 🔹 Admin Commands *(Requires `timber.admin` permission)*  
- `/timber admin` – Open the admin GUI.  
- `/timber reload` – Reload the configuration after saving the file.  

---

## 🔑 Permissions  
| Permission          | Description                                   |
|--------------------|----------------------------------|
| `timber.admin`      | Grants access to the admin menu (`/timber`). |
| `timber.capitate`   | Enables tree felling. |

---

## ⭐ Why this plugin is better than Timber v1

### 🌳 Accurate tree detection
The plugin analyzes real trees instead of simple log chains:

- Trunk shape  
- Block distribution by height  
- Amount of foliage  
- Foliage type (Overworld / Nether)  
- Natural tree origin  

**Buildings, farms, and artificial structures will NOT be destroyed.**

---

### 🛡️ Protection against abuse
Multiple checks prevent exploits and server lag:

- Block quantity limit  
- Tree "weight" control  
- Minimum foliage requirement  
- Ignores foliage with `persistent=true` (player-placed leaves)

---

### 🌍 WorldGuard support
- Permission checks **every single block**
- No region bypasses or protection exploits

---

### 🔥 Nether tree support
Fully supports Nether vegetation:

- Crimson & Warped trees  
- Wart blocks  
- Shroomlight  
- Correct Nether foliage logic

---

### ⚡ Performance & stability
Built for modern and high-load servers:

- Optimized tree search algorithm  
- Safe handling of large trees  
- Suitable for high-online servers



⚠ **Note:** This is not the final version of the plugin!  
We have exciting plans for future updates. If you have ideas or feedback, feel free to share them to help shape the future of **TreeTimber**! 🌟
